description: CompositionMelange grey round neck t-shirt made of 60% cotton/ 40% polyester, with ribbed neck, navy blue and white striped tape on the inseam of the neckline, iconic three stripes in navy blue running along shoulder till sleeve hem and embroidered logo on the chestFittingComfortWash care only hand wash gently Do not machine wash Wash with like colours Wash and iron inside out Do not use fabric softener Use mild detergent only Do not iron on motif/print/trims/logo Lightweight and quick drying, this grey tee from adidas gives a great comfortable feel and looks stylish too. The cotton-polyester fabric works to keep you dry throughout an active day or hectic training schedules. Team this with adidas tracks or jeans and shoes for an action filled day in the Sports club or for working out.Model's statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
